title: Assistant Quality Engineer (NPI)
description:
• Well Established Company
  • Basic $2500 - $3000 + AWS + Variable Bonus
  • Excellent Welfare and Benefits + Career progression
  • Working location: East
  • Working day: Monday to Friday
  • Working hours: 8.30am to 6pm

Job Responsibilities:

  • Support for NPI and FAI, oversee the quality of new products from sample build to mass production
  • Support New Product Introduction (NPI) and oversee the quality of new products from testing, sample builds to mass production.
    Perform FAI and tabulate measured data into First Article Inspection Report (FAIR).
  • Work closely with program managers on NPI builds and engineering evaluations.
  • Conduct trainings to QC inspectors before handover of NPI projects to Production.
  • Perform qualification validation of equipment, processes and test methods.
  • Create, review and update Work Instructions, Potential Failure Mode Effect Analysis (PFMEA) , Control Plans , Quality Inspection Standards and Sample boards before transfer to production.
  • Work with engineering team on jig designs, including reviewing 2D drawings and highlighting any issues, and review the need for measurement jigs.

Job Requirements:

  • Minimum Diploma in Precision, Mechanical, Manufacturing engineering, Quality Management and/or any equivalent engineering discipline.
  • 1 year of working experience in Quality Engineering or Manufacturing would be an added advantage
  • Training will be provided for those without/lesser experience

Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

LIONG ZHAO GUAN (R22107632)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492
